channel.title: SRAM on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in SRAM on Mizubikes

item.title: SRAM Force E1 2x vs 1x vs XPLR: Gearing and Gear Jumps Compared
item.description: SRAM Force E1 gearing compared cog by cog — 10-33 vs 10-36 vs 13-speed XPLR 10-46, with the actual gear jumps behind the range numbers.

item.title: SRAM 1x on a Road Bike: Is It Finally Worth It?
item.description: 1x road drivetrains are showing up more in the pro peloton. Here's what those setups actually look like, what SRAM Force XPLR changes, and whether your bike can even run it.

item.title: Why I'm Finally Thinking About Switching to SRAM
item.description: I've been on Shimano Ultegra since the R8100 launched. Here's why SRAM Force E1 is finally making me reconsider.

item.title: Buying a New or Used Gravel Bike? Check the Dropout Before You Commit to SRAM 1x13
item.description: If you want to run SRAM's 13-speed XPLR groupset, your frame needs a UDH dropout. Here's what to look for on popular gravel bikes — new and used.

item.title: UDH-Compatible Gravel Bikes: Every Frame on SRAM's List (May 2026)
item.description: A full list of UDH-compatible gravel bikes pulled from SRAM's official Bike Finder, updated May 2026.

item.title: SRAM Eagle S-Series: One Lineup to Replace Nine Drivetrains
item.description: SRAM's new Eagle S-Series simplifies its entire mountain bike drivetrain lineup — S100, S200, and S500 replace SX through XX1 mechanical and AXS.
